name: care_circle

scripts.lint: npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:frontend && npm run lint:mobile
scripts.format: npm run format:backend && npm run format:frontend && npm run format:mobile
scripts.type-check: npm run type-check:backend && npm run type-check:frontend

author: Canh Ta <canhta.w@gmail.com
description: CareCircle is a community-driven platform designed to connect caregivers and care seekers, facilitating support and resource sharing.
